message:
fix: trim GA measurement ID to remove trailing newlines

The NEXT_PUBLIC_GA_MEASUREMENT_ID env var had a trailing newline
which was causing invalid JavaScript when interpolated into the
gtag config script:

  gtag('config', 'G-xxx
  ', {  // <- newline inside string literal = SyntaxError

This caused: "Failed to execute 'appendChild' on 'Node': Invalid
or unexpected token"

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
